abilities.name: Primal Light
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may search your deck for a basic Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Pokemon that has δ on its card. Shuffle your deck afterward. This power can't be used if Aerodactyl is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Granite Head
attacks.text: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to Aerodactyl by attacks is reduced by 10.

tests.name: primal_light_attaches
tests.description: Test Primal Light searches and attaches basic Energy to delta Pokemon

tests.name: granite_head_reduction
tests.description: Test Granite Head reduces incoming damage by 10
